name: PRIMEENERGY RESOURCES CORP
summary: PrimeEnergy Resources Corporation is an oil and gas company engaged in development and operating activities, including exploration and production of oil, natural gas liquids (NGLs), and natural gas. The company also operates a well services business. It sells crude oil benchmarked to WTI and Brent, and gas benchmarked to WAHA, and conducts downstream purchases and sales of oil and gas commodities.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Production and sale of crude oil benchmarked to WTI and Brent pricing.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and sale of natural gas benchmarked to WAHA pricing hub.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Production and sale of NGLs including ethane, propane, isobutane, butane, and natural gasoline.

products.name: Well Services
products.description: Ownership and operation of a well services business supporting oil and gas operations.
